hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); MSG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.message'); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd'); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id'); DIR="$(cd "$CWD" && git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || dirlabel-bip39 "$CWD")"; DIRNAME="$(basename "$CWD")"; terminal-notifier -message "$MSG" -title "Claude ($DIRNAME:$DIR): Permission Needed" -sound Ping -group "$SID:permission" -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm

INPUT=$(cat); MSG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.message'); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd'); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id'); DIR="$(cd "$CWD" && git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || dirlabel-bip39 "$CWD")"; DIRNAME="$(basename "$CWD")"; terminal-notifier -message "$MSG" -title "Claude ($DIRNAME:$DIR): Question" -sound Ping -group "$SID:question" -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm

INPUT=$(cat); MSG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.message'); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd'); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id'); DIR="$(cd "$CWD" && git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || dirlabel-bip39 "$CWD")"; DIRNAME="$(basename "$CWD")"; terminal-notifier -message "$MSG" -title "Claude ($DIRNAME:$DIR): Waiting" -group "$SID:idle" -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm

INPUT=$(cat); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd'); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id'); DIR="$(cd "$CWD" && git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || dirlabel-bip39 "$CWD")"; DIRNAME="$(basename "$CWD")"; PREVIEW=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.last_assistant_message // "Response complete"' | tr '\n"' ' ' | cut -c1-80); terminal-notifier -message "$PREVIEW" -title "Claude ($DIRNAME:$DIR): Done" -group "$SID:stop" -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm
INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id'); for g in permission question idle stop; do terminal-notifier -remove "$SID:$g" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; done
INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id'); for g in permission question idle stop; do terminal-notifier -remove "$SID:$g" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; done
